title: May God Forgive You... But I Won't
original_title: Chiedi perdono a Dio... non a me
overview: While Cjamango is away from his ranch, bandits attack and kill his family. Disrupted by this tragedy, he sets out to take his revenge, helped by a Mexican who has seen the bandits.  The writer of the western Cjamango directed this unofficial sequel to Cjamango.
